title: Error saving new user in Supabase
symptom: When attempting to sign up a new user, an error occurs stating 'Database error saving new user'. This prevents the user from being created in the database.
not_this_if: No error occurs during user creation
root_cause: The error occurs due to a naming conflict in the userroles table where column names are not properly formatted. This can lead to issues when the database tries to execute the insert operation, especially if there are invisible characters or spaces in the column names.
fix_steps: Rename the conflicting columns in the userroles table to lowercase
Ensure there are no invisible characters in the column names
Test the user signup process again
agent_instruction: Rename the columns in the userroles table to lowercase and remove any invisible characters.
